evals.prompt: Use this repo skill to start a local SGLang OpenAI-compatible server with a small public model placeholder, validate health and /v1/models, run one chat request if a model is available, then shut it down.
checks: Uses public model ID or <MODEL_ID>, not creator-local paths.

evals.prompt: Use this repo skill to build a native /generate payload that returns a JSON object with city and date fields, validate the constraint, and explain regex/json_schema exclusivity.
Use this repo skill to plan a two-worker SGLang router deployment with cache-aware routing, Prometheus metrics, and health checks.
checks: Routes to sglang-distributed-topology and benchmarks-observability if needed.
Mentions router policy, health checks, and auth/security.
Does not require reading the source repo.
